case_title: ED OLSEN VS. BLACK DIAMOND SPORTS et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-06-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR STAY OF SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 10/28/02 TO ANTHOMY D. AGPAOA, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION SUBJECT TO FILING OF NOTICE OF ADDRESS CHANGE IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED, SUBJECT TO FILING OF NOTICE OF ADDRESS CHANGE. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2003 Off Calendar

Noticed Motion For Stay Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Stay of Sanctions issued on 10/28/02 to Anthomy D. Agpaoa, Esq., in the amount of $350.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion subject to filing of Notice of Address Change is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated, subject to filing of Notice of Address Change. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2002 Continued To Mar-24-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 3/24/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: JoAnn Prior, CSR# 9129. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2002 Continued To Dec-09-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/9/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patty Lee Hubble, CSR #3058. (212)
